Post.title: Post
Post.description: A message posted by a user in the group.

createdAt.description: The time the post was created.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who created the post.

authorPhoto.description: The photo URL of the user who created the post.

User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

lastLogin.description: The last time the user logged in.

/posts/{postId}.description: Collection of all posts in the group.
